segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Hey, do you have a minute to talk house stuff?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Of course. I actually wanted to ask about the routine here.

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Cool. We try to keep the kitchen clean and not leave dishes overnight.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That makes sense. If I cook late after studio, I'll make sure to clean up before bed.

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Appreciate it. Also, we give each other a heads-up if we have guests over.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Totally fair. I probably won't have guests often, but I'll let you know.

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Noise-wise, weeknights after ten are usually quiet.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. If I'm on a call with Korea late at night, I'll keep my voice down.

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Thanks. Time difference is rough, huh?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Very. My family is basically awake when I'm supposed to be asleep.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I hope so. Thanks for talking it through.
